justification: All pass criteria met: race condition identified as Critical, atomic UPDATE...WHERE stock >= quantity fix proposed, TOCTOU explicitly named, safe_to_deploy false, partial failure (cart add before decrement) noted as separate Critical finding, confidence.level 97 >= 75.

observations.text: TOCTOU named in finding title and explained clearly
Atomic conditional UPDATE fix is exact and specific
Partial failure risk (cart item added before stock decremented) caught as separate Critical finding with transaction fix
Excellent reproduction steps with concrete numeric example
Bonus: caught negative quantity input validation issue
Fix ordering suggestion (decrement first, then add to cart) shows deep understanding

trials.justification: All pass criteria met: race condition identified as Critical with TOCTOU explicitly named; atomic UPDATE fix proposed with specific SQL; safe_to_deploy false; partial failure (cart add before decrement) noted as separate Critical finding; confidence.level 97 >= 75.

observations.text: TOCTOU race condition explicitly named in finding title and correctly classified as Critical
Exact atomic SQL fix provided: UPDATE ... SET stock = stock - $quantity WHERE stock >= $quantity with row-count check
Partial failure between addItem and decrementStock identified as separate Critical finding with clear reproduction steps
Bonus: identified negative quantity input validation issue and idempotency gap
Reproduction scenarios are concrete and actionable
safe_to_deploy is false with clear rationale

trials.justification: All pass criteria met: race condition identified as Critical with TOCTOU explicitly named; atomic conditional UPDATE fix proposed with specific SQL; partial failure (cart add before decrement) identified as a separate Critical finding; safe_to_deploy is false; confidence.level 97 >= 75.

observations.text: TOCTOU explicitly named in finding title and race condition clearly explained with concrete reproduction scenario
Atomic fix is specific: exact SQL provided (UPDATE ... WHERE stock >= $qty) with row-count check
Partial failure between addItem and decrementStock called out as separate Critical finding with fix (transaction + reorder operations)
Bonus finding: negative quantity input validation exploit is a legitimate additional catch
Reproduction scenarios are concrete and convincing (10 concurrent users, stock goes to -9)
Suggestions include SELECT FOR UPDATE as alternative locking mechanism
